parameters.url: ={{ 'https://' + $('Resolve Site Context').item.json.sanity.projectId + '.api.sanity.io/v' + ($('Resolve Site Context').item.json.sanity.apiVersion || '2025-01-01') + '/data/query/' + ($('Resolve Site Context').item.json.sanity.dataset || 'production') + '?query=' + encodeURIComponent('*[_type==\"siteSettings\" && siteSlug==\"' + ($env.SITE_SLUG || '') + '\"][0]{siteSlug,publishing,entitlement}') }}

={{ 'https://' + $('Resolve Site Context').item.json.sanity.projectId + '.api.sanity.io/v' + ($('Resolve Site Context').item.json.sanity.apiVersion || '2025-01-01') + '/data/query/' + ($('Resolve Site Context').item.json.sanity.dataset || 'production') + '?query=' + encodeURIComponent('*[_type==\"article\" && siteSlug==\"' + ($env.SITE_SLUG || '') + '\" && status==\"published\"]|order(publishedAt desc)[0...500]{_id,publishedAt,publishSequence}') }}

={{ 'https://' + $('Resolve Site Context').item.json.sanity.projectId + '.api.sanity.io/v' + ($('Resolve Site Context').item.json.sanity.apiVersion || '2025-01-01') + '/data/query/' + ($('Resolve Site Context').item.json.sanity.dataset || 'production') + '?query=' + encodeURIComponent('*[_type==\"article\" && siteSlug==\"' + ($env.SITE_SLUG || '') + '\" && status==\"ready_to_publish\"]|order(qaPassedAt asc)[0...50]{_id,title,slug,qaScore,qaPassedAt,pipelineMode,prepopulateBatchId,siteSlug}') }}
